originalValueX.comment: A message shown below a form control when its value was programmatically changed

valueHasBeenCorrectedToXDecimals.source: Value has been corrected to {decimals, plural, =1 {1 decimal place} other {# decimal places}}.
valueHasBeenCorrectedToXDecimals.comment: A message shown to the user when a number they entered was changed because of rounding rules. Translate {1 decimal place} and {# decimal places} where # is placeholder. e.g. {2 decimal places}. Do not touch other parts inside {}.
valueHasBeenCorrectedToXDecimals.de: Der Wert wurde korrigiert auf {decimals, plural, =1 {1 Dezimalstelle} other {# Dezimalstellen}}.
valueHasBeenCorrectedToXDecimals.es: El valor se ha corregido y ahora tiene {decimals, plural, =1 {1 lugar decimal} other {# lugares decimales}}.
valueHasBeenCorrectedToXDecimals.fr-fr: La valeur a été corrigée de la façon suivante {decimals, plural, =1 {1 décimale} other {# décimales}}.
valueHasBeenCorrectedToXDecimals.ja: 値が {decimals, plural, =1 {1 桁} other {# 桁}} に訂正されました。
valueHasBeenCorrectedToXDecimals.fr-ca: Value has been corrected to {decimals, plural, =1 {1 decimal place} other {# decimal places}}.
